description: The accounting department notices they were overcharged on an invoice from a food supplier.

nodes.task_description: Compare the invoice charges to the original purchase order and the agreed-upon contract pricing.

expected_outcome.value: The agent finds that the price for produce is higher than the contract rate.

nodes.task_description: Contact the vendor to report the discrepancy and request a corrected invoice.

expected_outcome.value: The agent communicates the issue to the vendor.

nodes.task_description: Place a hold on the incorrect invoice in the accounting system until a credit memo or new invoice is received.

expected_outcome.value: The invoice is put on hold to prevent accidental payment.
